input: Chaza lilanga eMhlabeni lapho khona i-gravity ibuyela emuva ngekushesha emahora lambalwa. Bantfu netilwane benta njani?
Dala umlingisi lowake waba liqhawe kepha sewube sigebengu ngenca yekungavisisani lokubuhlungu.
Bhala ngemlingisi lowekugcina eluhlobo lwabo lophila emhlabeni lochubeke phambili ngaphandle kwabo.
Dala umlingisi umtfunti wakhe sewuphilile futsi wenta njengemlingani wabo lonebubi.

Bhala i-imeyili kute ulandzelele ingcoco yemsebenti lowaba nayo emavikini lamabili lendlulile. Veta inshisekelo yakho lechubekako kulesikhundla, bonga loyo lococa naye ngesikhatsi sakhe, futsi ucele lwati lolusha.
Kufanele uhlele umhlangano nemlingani wakho kute ucoce ngenchubekelembili yephrojekthi. Bhala i-imeyili lehloniphekile ucela sikhatsi lesifanele semhlangano bese uniketa luhlaka lolufishane.
Bhalela umphatsi wakho i-imeyili ucele imphendvulo ngembiko losandza kuwufaka. Veta sifiso sakho sekutfutfukisa umsebenti wakho bese ucela tiphakamiso leticondzile.
Bhala i-imeyili kumphatsi wakho ucolisa ngekuphutsa umncamulajucu wephrojekthi. Chaza sizatfu sekubambezeleka, bese uveta tinyatselo takho tekucinisekisa kutsi angeke kuphindze kwenteke.
Bhalela i-imeyili kumtsengisi lohambise imikhicito lengakalungi nobe lelimele. Chaza ngesizotsa lendzaba, unikete imininingwane, bese ucela kubuyiselwa imali nobe kushintjwa.
Bhala i-imeyili kummeleli wetinsita temakhasimende ubuta ngekutfolakala kanye nekucaciswa kwemkhicito lonenshisekelo yekuwutsenga.
Ubonile kutsi kubhadalwa lokungakalungi esikweletini sakho senyanga. Bhalela litiko lekukhokha i-imeyili uchaze lendzaba futsi ucele kutsi ilungiswe.
Bhala i-imeyili ekhasimendeni lelibalulekile libonge ngebhizinisi labo lelichubekako, bese ubatisa ngekukhutsatwa lokukhetsekile noma kuniketa.
Bhala i-imeyili etikolweni letinsita temakhasimende lenkampani kute ukhulume ngesipiliyoni lesibi lonaso ngensita yabo. Chaza lenkinga bese uphakamisa kutsi ungatsandza kutsi icatululwe njani.
Bhala i-imeyili kute ucele kubuyiselwa nobe kushintja umkhicito lowutsenge ku-inthanethi. Faka inombolo yakho ye-oda kanye nesizatfu sekubuya.
Bhalela umngani wakho sikhatsi lesidze ungakhulumi naye i-email. Batsatse ngaloko lebekwenteka empilweni yakho ubabute kutsi baphila njani.
Bhala i-imeyili ubonge lilunga lemndeni nobe umngani ngesipho labakuphe sona. Cacisa kutsi kungani usijabulela lesipho kanye nendlela lohlela kusisebentisa ngayo.
Bhala i-imeyili lengakahleleki umema bangani ephathini loyibambako. Faka imininingwane lemayelana nelusuku, sikhatsi, indzawo, kanye nanobe ngumiphi imisebenti lekhetsekile.
Bhala i-imeyili uhalalisela umngani wakho nobe umlingani wakho ngekuphumelela kwamuva. Veta injabulo yakho ngabo futsi usho emavi ekukhutsata.
Bhalela i-imeyili umngani wakho lomkhulu noma lilunga lemndeni wabelane ngetindzaba letijabulisako. Batjele imininingwane nekutsi utiva njani ngaloko.
Bhala i-imeyili ehhovisi lekwemukelwa enyuvesi ucela lwati mayelana neluhlelo lolutsite. Buta ngenchubo yekufaka sicelo, tinsuku tekugcina, njll.
Bhala i-imeyili kuprofesa wangaphambilini umcele kutsi akubhalele incwadzi yekuncoma. Niketa imininingwane mayelana nesikhundla bese unikela kuniketa lwati lolubanti.
Bhalela sikhulu sahulumende i-imeyili lesemtsetfweni lekhuluma ngendzaba yendzawo lekukhatsatako. Shano lokukukhatsatako, unikete emaciniso lakusekelako, futsi uphakamise tisombululo letingaba khona.
Usandza kucala umsebenti lomusha futsi ufuna kutetfula kumalunga elicembu lakho. Bhala i-imeyili lesemtsetfweni utetfule futsi uvete injabulo yakho ngekusebentisana.
Bhala i-imeyili kumcashi wangaphambilini locela kutsi uwasebentise njengesikhombo sesicelo lesisha semsebenti. Ngesizotsa cela imvume yabo futsi ubabonge ngekusekela kwabo.

Bhala i-imeyili lebandzako kuklayenti lelingahle libe khona wetfula inkampani yakho futsi unikete tinsita takho. Gcizelela emandla akho labalulekile bese uchaza kutsi ungalisita njani libhizinisi labo.
Bhala i-imeyili yekumaketha lememetela kwetfulwa kwemkhicito lomusha. Faka imininingwane mayelana netici temkhicito, tinzuzo, kanye nanobe ngutiphi tikhutsato letikhetsekile nobe taphulelo.
Bhala i-imeyili yekulandzelela iklayenti lelingahle libe khona lelivete inshisekelo ngemkhicito wakho. Bakhumbute ngetinzuzo futsi ucele kutsi utawuphendvula nobe ngumiphi imibuto.
Bhala i-imeyili lecinisekisa umbhalisi lomusha wencwadzi yetindzaba yenkampani yakho. Babonge ngekubhalisela, batjele kutsi yini labayilindzele, futsi ufake nesicelo sekutsatsa sinyatselo.

Bhala i-imeyili yekutsengisa ekhasimendeni lelikhona leliniketa imikhicito lehlobene lelingahle libe nenshisekelo kuyo ngekuya ngekutsenga kwaphambilini. Gcizelela kutsi kungani lemikhicito iphelelisa kutsenga kwabo.
Bhala i-imeyili kuprofesa wakho ucela kunwetjwa umsebenti. Chaza simo sakho futsi unikete sikhatsi lesifanele sekutsi ungawucedza nini lomsebenti.
Bhala i-imeyili kulabo lofundza nabo labahlanganisa iphrojekthi yelicembu. Yabela imisebenti, ubeke tinsuku tekugcina, futsi uphakamise sikhatsi semhlangano kute nicoce ngenchubekelembili.
Bhala i-imeyili kuprofesa lobuta ngematfuba elucwaningo langaba khona. Gcizelela tintfo lotitsandzako bese uchaza kutsi kungani ungatsandza kusebenta nabo.
Bhala i-imeyili kuprofesa wakho ucolise ngekuphutsa likilasi ngenca yetimo letingalindzelekile. Buta kutsi kukhona yini tintfo lokufanele utibambe.
Bhala i-imeyili kuprofesa wangaphambilini noma umelusi locela seluleko semsebenti. Chaza kafishane simo lokhona nyalo bese ucela sicondziso sekutsi ungachubeka njani.

Labanye bakholelwa kutsi kufundza nge-inthanethi kuphumelela kakhulu kunekufundza kwesintfu, kantsi labanye baphikisa kutsi kufundza emakilasini kusebalulekile. Coca ngayo yomibili imibono bese unika umbono wakho.

Labanye bantfu bakholelwa kutsi tinkinga temvelo kufanele tilungiswe emhlabeni wonkhe, kantsi labanye bacabanga kutsi kufanele tilungiswe endzaweni. Coca ngayo yomibili imibono bese unika umbono wakho.
Labanye bakholelwa kutsi kufinyelela kulinganisela emsebentini nasemphilweni kumatima kakhulu lamuhla kunasesikhatsini lesengcile. Uvumelana noma awuvumelani kangakanani nalesitatimende?
Emaveni lamanyenti, silinganiso sesisindvo sebantfu siyakhula, kantsi emazinga emphilo kanye nekuvivinya umtimba ayancipha. Ngutiphi tizatfu kanye netisombululo letingaba khona talenkinga?
Labanye batsi kuhlolwa kwetilwane kute kwentiwe lucwaningo lwetekwelapha kuyadzingeka, kantsi labanye bakholelwa kutsi kufanele kuvinjelwe. Coca ngayo yomibili imibono bese unika umbono wakho.
Emaveni lamanyenti, bantfu labasha balwa kamatima kute batfole umsebenti. Ngutiphi tizatfu talendzaba, futsi ngutiphi tisombululo longasiphakamisa?
Kukhuluphala kakhulu sekuyinkinga lenkhulu emaveni lamanyenti. Ngutiphi tizatfu talendzaba, futsi ngutiphi tinyatselo letingatsatfwa kute kulungiswe lendzaba?
Emadolobheni lamanyenti lamakhulu, kungcola kwemoya nemanti kuyinkinga lebalulekile. Ngutiphi tizatfu letibangela letinkinga, futsi ngutiphi tinyatselo letingatsatfwa kute kutfutfukiswe lesimo?

Bantfu labadzala labanyenti solo abanawo emakhono lasisekelo edijithali emhlabeni wanamuhla. Ngutiphi tizatfu letibangela loku, futsi yini lengakwentiwa kute kwentiwe ncono kufundza nekubhala nge-digital?
Etindzaweni letinyenti tasemadolobheni, bantfu labangenamakhaya bayakhula. Ngutiphi tizatfu talokwandza, futsi yini lengakwentiwa kute inciphise lenkinga?
Kushintja kwesimo selitulu kuba nemtselela lomkhulu kuleplanethi yetfu. Ucabanga kutsi ngutiphi tizatfu letiyinhloko tekushintja kwesimo selitulu, futsi yini imiphumela yako lengaba khona emvelweni?
Kutsenga nge-inthanethi sekutsandvwa kakhulu kuleminyaka yamuva. Ngutiphi tizatfu talomkhuba, futsi unemtselela muni kumabhizinisi endzawo?
Etindzaweni letinyenti emhlabeni, linani lebantfu labafundza tincwadzi lehle kakhulu. Ngutiphi tizatfu talokwehla, futsi yini imiphumela emmangweni?
Kuba nebantfu labanyenti kakhulu sekuba yintfo lekhatsatako kakhulu emadolobheni lamanyenti. Ngutiphi tizatfu tekukhula kwebantfu, futsi yini imiphumela ekuphileni kwasemadolobheni?

Kuhlanganiswa kwemhlaba wonkhe kuletse tinzuzo letinyenti, kepha futsi kunemitselela lemibi etincenyeni letitsite temmango. Yini lebangela kuhlanganiswa kwemhlaba wonkhe, futsi kuwutsintse njani umhlaba wonkhe?
Eminyakeni yamuva, kusebenta lokukhashane sekuvame kakhulu. Coca ngetinzuzo nebubi bekusebenta lokukhashane.
Intfutfuko yetebucwepheshe ishintje indlela bantfu labakhulumisana ngayo. Ngutiphi tinzuzo nebubi balentfutfuko?
Emadolobha lamanyenti atjala imali etinhlelo tekutfutsa temmango kute kuncishiswe kuminyana kwetimoto. Coca ngetinzuzo nebubi balolutjalomali.
Kutfolakala kwekuhamba emaveni emhlaba sekukhule kakhulu. Coca ngetinzuzo nebubi betivakashi kanye nemave lasingatsa.
Kulamanye emave, tindzima tebulili tiyashintja, kantsi kulamanye, tindzima tesintfu tiyachubeka. Uyavuma yini kutsi tindzima tebulili tiyashintja? Loku kuba namuphi umtselela emmangweni?

Labanye bakholelwa kutsi batali kufanele babe nesibopho sekukhulisa bantfwana kuphela, kantsi labanye bacabanga kutsi hulumende kufanele adlale indzima. Coca ngayo yomibili imibono bese unika umbono wakho.
Labanye bakholelwa kutsi imidiya yekuchumana inemtselela lomuhle emmangweni, kantsi labanye bacabanga kutsi inemtselela lomubi. Coca ngayo yomibili imibono bese unika umbono wakho.
Kuhlanganiswa kwemhlaba wonkhe kuholela ekulahlekelweni kwebunikati bemasiko. Uvumelana nobe awuvumelani kangakanani? Ngutiphi tinyatselo letingatsatfwa kute kugcinwe emasiko endzawo?
Labanye bakholelwa kutsi buciko buyincenye lebalulekile emmangweni, kantsi labanye bacabanga kutsi buyintfo yekunetisa. Coca ngayo yomibili imibono bese unika umbono wakho.
Ake ucabange unemandla lamakhulu lakuvumela kutsi umise sikhatsi imizuzu lengu-10 njalo ngeli-awa. Ukufaka njani loku eluhlelweni lwakho lwamalanga onkhe?
Bhala ngelilanga empilweni yemuntfu lohleleke kakhulu lohlela yonkhe imizuzu yelusuku lwakhe. Kwentekani nangabe tintfo ticala kungahambi kahle?
Sungula luhlelo lweluhlu lwetintfo lokufanele utente lolusungulako nalolungakavami lolugucula imisebenti yemalanga onkhe ibe ngumdlalo. Ngumiphi imitsetfo, futsi ikukhutsata njani?
Dala indzaba mayelana nemuntfu lozama kuyekela umkhuba lomubi lovamile (njengekuhlehlisa noma kudla lokulula kakhulu) asebentisa tindlela letingakavami noma temlingo.
Cabanga ngelihhovisi lapho wonkhe umsebenti amelele khona imiva leyehlukile (sib., injabulo, intfukutselo, umona). Bahamba njani ngemisebenti yemalanga onkhe kanye nemihlangano?

Chaza inhlalayenta yemsebenti lokhashane, kepha esikhundleni sekusebenta ekhaya, umlingisi usebenta kusuka etindzaweni letehlukene letimangalisako (njengetichingi letintantako noma emahlatsini lahlakaniphile).
Ehhovisi lemilingo, tisebenti tisebentisa imitsi kute tikhulise umkhicito wato wemisebenti leyehlukene. Kwentekani nangabe umuntfu atsatsa umutsi longakalungi emsebentini longakalungi?

I-app lensha itsi ilingisa 'lilanga lemsebenti leliphelele' ngekuya ngemikhuba yemuntfu kanye netintfo latitsandzako. Bhala ngemuntfu lozama, kuphela kutfola kutsi kucinile kakhulu kunaloko lebebakulindzele.
Cabanga nje uhlala endlini lekhona kutihlanta kodvwa itfutfukisa ‘imibono’ yayo mayelana nekutsi kuhlanteka kufanele kubukeke kanjani. Ngutiphi tinkinga letivela?
Chaza luhlelo lwemsebenti lapho wonkhe umsebenti wasendlini ugucuka ube ngumdlalo lomncane, lophelele ngemazinga, imivuzo, kanye netinsayeya letingalindzelekile.
Bhala ngelikhaya lapho tonkhe tintfo tekusebenta tingakhuluma khona. Ngamunye wabo unebuntfu lobehlukile futsi uniketa seluleko (noma tikhalato) ngesikhatsi wenta imisebenti yakho yemalanga onkhe.
Sungula indlela yekuhlanta onkhe malanga emhlabeni lapho khona onkhe malanga aletsa sihibe semlingo lesehlukile, njengelutfuli loluloyisiwe noma emathulusi ekuhlanta layingoti.
Njalo uma ugeza, lisokisi liyalahleka, kepha esikhundleni sekutsi linyamalale, lihamba ngesikhatsi. Bhala ngekutfolakala loku kuholela kuko.
Umlandzeleli wakho wekuvivinya umtimba ucala kukunika seluleko lesikhetsekile, lesicishe sibe sengcondvo. Igucula njani inhlalayenta yakho, futsi yini i-ajenda yayo lefihlekile?
Ake ucabange kutsi njalo uma usebenta, utfutfwa uye kulenye indzawo lapho emandla akho emtimba atsintsa umhlaba lokutungeletile. Chaza sikhatsi sinye sekutivocavoca.
Bhala ngemuntfu lowenta sivumelwano nesilwane semlingo kutsi anamatsele emigomeni yabo yemphilo. Lilanga ngalinye beqa umsebenti, babhekene nemphumela lomangalisako kodvwa longakalungi.
Dala indzaba lapho khona kulungiselela kudla kwansuku zonke kuphenduka kube yi-adventure yekupheka-sitsako ngasinye sivela eveni lemlingo futsi sidzinga kuphatfwa lokukhetsekile.
Ake ucabange ngekilasi le-yoga leyenteka esitudiyo lesinemlingo lapho khona emandla ladonsela phansi ashintja, sikhatsi sigoba, futsi tindlela tekuhlala titsatsa imiphumela yemilingo.
Chaza kuhamba kwamalanga onkhe edolobheni lelimangalisako leligcwele tidalwa temlingo, lapho khona titfutsi temmango tifaka ekhatsi tincola letihlakaniphile, tidalwa letindizako, noma ema-portal.
Njalo uma utsatsa ibhasi uya emsebentini, uhlangabetana nenguqulo lehlukile yekuhamba lokufanako endzaweni yonkhe lefanako. Ngutiphi tindlela nobe tingucuko locala kutibona?
Bhala ngetingcoco letingakavami kepha letimfisha letenteka etitfutsini temmango emkhatsini webagibeli labavela etindzaweni letehluke kakhulu.

I-Teleportation yindlela levame kakhulu yekutfutsa, kepha kuphazamiseka kwenta kutsi bagibeli babambeke sikhashana emkhatsini wetindzawo. Chaza kutsi bantfu bakusingatsa njani lokungakhululeki kwamalanga onkhe.
Ake ucabange ngesitolo sekudla lesinesikhatsi lesitako lapho khona emarobhothi lacondziswa yi-AI asita batsenga, kodvwa anengcondvo yawo. Loku kukutsintsa njani indlela yekutsenga?
Gucula lilanga lelivamile lekugijima imisebenti libe ngumfuno we-epic, lapho khona stop ngayinye yetfula insayeya lehlukile (sib., kutfola titsako letingakavami, kucatulula emaphazili, njll.).
Uniketwe umsebenti wekutsenga lokuyimfihlakalo, kodvwa titolo lotfunyelwa kuto tiyintfo levamile—ngayinye inemfihlo ledzinga kuvetwa.
Uniketwa luhlu lwekudla lolunetintfo letibonakala tingabi khona. Njengobe usesha, utfola kutsi intfo ngayinye ingumkhondo loholela entfweni lenkhulu kakhulu.
Emhlabeni lapho emaphupho angalawulwa khona ngekulandzela imikhuba letsite, chaza kulungiselela kwemuntfu liphupho lakhe leliphelele.
Bhala ngemuntfu lowenta kuzindla etindzaweni letingakavami kakhulu (sib., etulu kwendlu lephakeme, ngaphansi kwelwandle, ehlatsini leliminyene) kute atibeke emkhatsini ngemuva kwelilanga lelidze.
Chaza kusihlwa lokujwayelekile lokuchithwa nesilwane lesifuywako semlingo lesinemandla ekushintja simo saso kute sihambisane nesimo semnikati.
Chaza umlingisi longakhoni kufa kepha uva bonkhe buhlungu lobuncane ngekulimala kwabo. Babhekana njani naloku kuba khona?
Kubanjwa inkomfa emkhatsini wetinhlobo letehlukene tetilwane letivela kulamanye emave kute kwakhiwe sivumelwano sekuthula semhlaba wonkhe. Batincoba njani tihibe telulwimi nemasiko?
Bhala ngeplanethi leyakhiwa luhlobo lolutfutfukile kodvwa seyilahliwe. Yini labahlali labasha labayitfola mayelana nenjongo yayo sibili?
Emhlabeni lapho tinkhumbulo tingabiwa khona, chaza imphilo yelisela letinkumbulo lelicala kulahlekelwa ngumlandvo wabo.
Licembu lebahloli litfutfukise tebucwepheshe tekugcuma emkhatsini wetilinganiso, kepha silinganiso ngasinye siyingoti kakhulu kunaleso sekugcina. Yini leyenta kutsi bachubeke?
Kuvela umnyango longacondzakali ehlatsini loholela embusweni we-fae. Yini labahambi bekucala labayitfola ngakulolunye luhlangotsi?
Emadragon sekaphelile, kepha munye utalwe kabusha emtimbeni wemuntfu. Loku kulitsintsa njani live lemilingo?
Bhala ngemuntfu losayina inkontileka nemlumbi lonemandla angati futsi nyalo kufanele agcwalise umsebenti locishe ungakenteki.
Chaza lidolobha lapho sonkhe sakhiwo kanye nemigwaco iphila khona, inemicabango nemiva yayo. Labahlali bahlala njani nemakhaya abo lahlala khona?
output: What is the local culture like?

input: Inkhosana nome inkhosatana icalekisiwe kutsi iphenduke silwane njalo ebusuku. Kufanele batfole indlela yekususa lesicalekiso ngaphambi kwekutsi sibadle.
Umuntfu ucala kuhlangabetana nemaphupho abo lamabi empilweni yangempela. Njalo uma bavuka, lesinye sicucu semhlaba wemaphupho lamabi siyabalandzela sibe liciniso.
Bhala ngesicucu sebuchwepheshe (lucingo, laptop, njll.) lesihlaselwa yintfo lembi. Imkhohlisa njani umnikati wayo?
Edolobheni lelincane, lilanga livele linyamalale futsi kuhlala kusekhatsi nebusuku. Kute umuntfu longaphuma kulelidolobha, futsi tidalwa letingaketayeleki ticala kuvela ebumnyameni.
Licembu lebangani likhubeka encwadzini lendzala lechaza umkhuba wekubita nkulunkulu lokhohliwe. Bakwenta njengelihlaya—kuze kube ngulapho kusebenta.
Umuntfu lowenta bonodoli udala bonodoli labafana nekuphila, kodvwa ngemuva kwekunyamalala kwakhe lokuyimfihlakalo, bonodoli bacala kwenta shengatsi bayaphila, ngamunye unetinhloso letimbi.
Licembu lebahloli litfola imphucuko lefihlekile leseyingakaphatfwa ngumhlaba wangaphandle emakhulwini eminyaka. Basebentisana njani nalommango?
Chaza luhambo loluya endzaweni lejulile kakhulu elwandle, lapho batfola khona intfo lebebangakayilindzeli—lidolobha lasendvulo leligadwe tidalwa letingatiwa.
Eludzakeni lolugcwele tiphepho tesihlabathi letiyingoti kanye netidalwa letifihlekile, bantfu labadvumile bacudzelana emncintiswaneni waminyaka yonkhe kute batfole umklomelo longakavami.
Licembu letiphangi tesibhakabhaka lihamba ngemikhumbi yemoya etichiwini letintantako nasemadolobheni esibhakabhakeni lifuna umcebo loyinsumansumane lofihlwe emafini.
Umseshi uvuka angakhumbuli emahora langu-48 lendlulile, kuphela kutfola kutsi ngubo labasolwa kakhulu ebugebengwini lobukhulu. Bakhombisa njani kutsi bete licala?
Ihhotela imfihlakalo livela etindzaweni letehlukene emhlabeni wonkhe, kepha ebusuku kuphela. Uma sekufike ekuseni, kuyanyamalala. Yini imfihlo yayo?
Egalari yebuciko ledvumile, lemifanekiso icala kuhleba timfihlo ngebantfu labayibukako. Yini lesemuva kwalesimanga lesimangalisako?
Bhala ngelidolobha lapho, ngamunye ngamunye, bantfu banyamalala ngaphandle kwemkhondo. Labo labasele abanayo inkumbulo yalabalahlekile.
Umuntfu longamati lofake sifonyo uhlala avela etindzaweni letehlukahlukene tebugebengu kepha akaze abonakale kutsi uxhumene nebugebengu. Bobani, futsi yini labayatiko?
Cabanga ngemlandvo lomunye lapho Leonardo da Vinci acedza khona umshini wekusebenta sikhatsi. Yini lebeyitawenteka nangabe itfolakala esikhatsini salamuhla?
Chaza indzaba yelicembu lekumelana ngesikhatsi sembuso locindzetelako emlandvweni, kanye netinkinga tekutiphatsa lababhekene nato kute basindze.
Dala umbhalo wejenali lovela kumhloli wemlandvo lodvumile lokhubeka emhlabatsini longekho kunobe nguyiphi imephu.
Umbuso lokucatjangwa kutsi ulahlekile emlandvweni uyatfolakala kabusha, kepha bantfu bawo abakagugi emakhulwini eminyaka. Kwentekani kubo?
Esikhatsini lesitako, kucaphela kungadluliselwa emitimbeni leyehlukene. Kwentekani nangabe umuntfu adlulisela emtimbeni wekufakelwa futsi afuna kubuyela esimeni sakhe sekucala?
Licembu labososayensi litfola kutsi emaphupho akhombisa tintfo letifananako. Loku kuyishintja njani indlela lesicondza ngayo ingcondvo?
Ekuphileni ngemuva kwekufa, imiphefumulo yehlulelwa ngekubuka tinkhumbulo temusa letishiye ngemuva. Umlingisi uyabona kutsi sebaphelelwa yimali.
Esikhatsini lesitako lesilawulwa yi-AI, sincumo sekugcina bantfu labavunyelwe kusenta kutsi nguyiphi inkumbulo labafuna kuyilondvolota phakadze naphakadze.
Bhala indzaba lemayelana nelicembu lemaqhawe lamakhulu latsatse umhlalaphansi laphuma emhlalaphansi ngemsebenti munye wekugcina.
Chaza ema-adventures emhambi wesikhatsi lobhajwa ngephutsa endzaweni yonkhe lefanako lapho khona tintfo letenteka temlandvo titsatse lijika lehluke kakhulu.
Cabanga ngembuso lapho imiva ilawula khona simo selitulu. Chaza lilanga empilweni yesakhamuti lesihlala lapho.
Dala indzaba lelandzisako lejikeleta intfo yasendvulo, uma itsintfwa, ikhombisa umnikati umfanekiso welikusasa labo, kepha imizuzwane lelishumi kuphela.
Bhala indzaba lemfisha ngembono wemkhumbi wemkhatsi lonemiva lolangatelela bangani kepha unamatsele kuplanethi lengahlalwa bantfu.
Bhala inkhulumomphendvulwano emkhatsini wemseshi kanye nengcondvo yebugebengu lababangani bebuntfwana ngasese.
Dala ingcoco emkhatsini wemkhatsi kanye nemfokati lokhulumisana asebentisa imibala esikhundleni semagama.
Bhala inkhulumomphendvulwano emkhatsini wemuntfu lophilako nesipoko lesiniketa seluleko semphilo lesingakalindzeleki.
Yakha ingcoco emkhatsini we-AI nemdali wayo, lapho khona i-AI ibuta injongo yekuba khona kwayo.
Bhala inkhulumomphendvulwano emkhatsini wemakhosi lamabili lakha licebo lekucedza inkhosi letsandzekako, kepha ngekujika kutsi lomunye wabo une-ajenda lefihlekile.
Chaza umhlaba lapho khona imphucuko ihlala etichiwini letintantako esibhakabhakeni, futsi tinsita tihanjiswa ngekusebentisa inethiwekhi yemabhaluni lamakhulu.
Cabanga ngemmango lapho khona imilingo nebuchwepheshe kuhlanganiswa ngaphandle kwemthungo. Bantfu bawasebentisa njani lamandla ekuphileni kwabo kwamalanga onkhe?
Dala umhlaba lapho khona umtfombo wemanti kuphela yi-oasis lemfihlakalo lehamba njalo ngenyanga, leholela ekufudukeni njalo kwabo bonkhe labahlala khona.
Chaza umhlaba wangemuva kwe-apocalyptic lowakha kabusha waba yi-utopia, kepha unetimfihlo letingaphansi letisongela kuthula kwawo.
Bhala inkondlo lapho khona sikhatsi ngasinye sibe ngumuntfu futsi bahlanganyela engcocweni mayelana nemjikeleto wemphilo.
Dala luchungechunge lwe-haikus ngayinye imelela inkumbulo lehlukene yelutsandvo lolukhohliwe.
Yakha inkondlo letsatsa umfundzi ngeluhlelo lwemaphupho e-surreal, uhlanganisa liciniso kanye nemcabango.
Bhala inkondlo letsatsa sigci nemisindvo yelidolobha leliphitsitelako kube shengatsi yi- symphony.
Ake ucabange nje imvelo ihlabelela ingoma yekulala emhlabeni ngaphambi kwekutsi kufike busuku. Ngumaphi emagama nemifanekiso lebeyitawusebentisa?
Kutsiwani nangabe yonkhe imibala emhlabeni icala kunyamalala ngayinye? Chaza kutsi kwentekani nangabe sekusele umbala munye kuphela.
Dala indzaba lemayelana nemtapolwati locuketse yonkhe incwadzi leyake yabhalwa kanye nato tonkhe tincwadzi letingabhalwa.
Cabanga ngemhlaba lapho imiva ifakwa khona emabhodleleni futsi ithengiswa. Loku bekutawushintja njani kusebentisana kwebantfu kanye nemmango?
Kutsiwani nangabe bantfu bacala kuguga emuva, babe bancane njengobe baphila sikhatsi lesidze? Loku bekutawutsintsa njani buhlobo babo kanye nemcondvo wesikhatsi?
